# BUG-006 Writeup
> Generated by [Quality Playbook](https://github.com/andrewstellman/quality-playbook) v1.4.6 — Andrew Stellman
> Date: 2026-04-20 · Project: virtio-1.4.6

## 1. Summary

REQ-008 requires wake-specific setup and teardown symmetry, but `drivers/virtio/virtio_mmio.c:328-337,458-464` enables IRQ wake in setup and never disables it before `free_irq()`.

## 2. Why this is a bug

The MMIO transport records wake capability with `enable_irq_wake(irq)` under `wakeup-source`, then uses `vm_del_vqs()` for both normal teardown and setup-error cleanup. Without a matching `disable_irq_wake(irq)`, wake state leaks across the same lifecycle that allocated it.

## 3. Regression test

- **Requirement:** REQ-008
- **Test:** `quality/test_regression.py::TestCodeReviewRegressions.test_bug_006_mmio_teardown_disables_irq_wake_before_free_irq`
- **Regression patch:** `quality/patches/BUG-006-regression-test.patch`

## 4. FAIL -> PASS evidence

```text
RED: Command: python3 <direct regression assertion runner> test_bug_006_mmio_teardown_disables_irq_wake_before_free_irq
RED: AssertionError: 'disable_irq_wake(' not found in vm_del_vqs()
GREEN: Command: python3 <temp source patcher BUG-006> && python3 <direct regression assertion runner> test_bug_006_mmio_teardown_disables_irq_wake_before_free_irq
GREEN: test_bug_006_mmio_teardown_disables_irq_wake_before_free_irq: PASS
```

See `quality/results/BUG-006.red.log` and `quality/results/BUG-006.green.log`.

## 5. Challenge gate

`quality/challenge/BUG-006-challenge.md` -> **CONFIRMED**

## 6. The fix

- **Fix patch:** `quality/patches/BUG-006-fix.patch`

```diff
diff --git a/drivers/virtio/virtio_mmio.c b/drivers/virtio/virtio_mmio.c
index 6666666..7777777 100644
--- a/drivers/virtio/virtio_mmio.c
+++ b/drivers/virtio/virtio_mmio.c
@@ -328,10 +328,13 @@ static void vm_del_vqs(struct virtio_device *vdev)
 {
 	struct virtio_mmio_device *vm_dev = to_virtio_mmio_device(vdev);
 	struct virtqueue *vq, *n;
+	int irq = platform_get_irq(vm_dev->pdev, 0);
 
 	list_for_each_entry_safe(vq, n, &vdev->vqs, list)
 		vm_del_vq(vq);
 
-	free_irq(platform_get_irq(vm_dev->pdev, 0), vm_dev);
+	if (of_property_read_bool(vm_dev->pdev->dev.of_node, "wakeup-source"))
+		disable_irq_wake(irq);
+	free_irq(irq, vm_dev);
 }
```
